title: Green frog pillow plush - deep clean and tear repairs
description: A soft green frog pillow plush came in with tears, small holes, and tired pile from regular use. We deep cleaned the fabric, repaired the damaged areas, and closed the holes so the pillow could go back to being a comfortable cuddle companion.
itemDetails: Frog pillow plush toys sit between stuffed animal and cushion: broad, soft bodies for resting on, plush fabric for cuddling, and simple facial features that give them a toy-like character. Some versions are sold as folding Pillow Pets-style companions, while others are decorative or travel cushions shaped like frogs. This style is usually made from short or medium polyester plush with polyester fibre fill. Because the large body is used as both toy and pillow, seams and corners can take extra stress from squeezing, sleeping, and washing.
repairDetails: The frog pillow needed a practical refresh. We deep cleaned the green plush to lift surface grime and brighten the pile, then repaired the tears and small holes that had opened through use. The damaged sections were stitched closed with matching support so the pillow kept its soft shape while becoming strong enough for regular cuddling again.
